description_long: This is a large, adult male figure with a robust build and a slightly hunched posture. The skin appears mottled and dark, with visible muscle definition and pronounced veins, giving a somewhat menacing or unhealthy appearance. The face is expressionless, and the head is bald, with no visible hair. The figure is dressed in simple, loose-fitting pants and wears dark shoes, with no upper body clothing or accessories. The hands are large and hang loosely at the sides, with elongated fingers. The overall appearance suggests a character that might be used in a gritty or dystopian urban environment.
description: A large, bald adult male with mottled skin, muscular build, and loose dark pants, standing in a slightly hunched posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest, muscular arms, and expressionless face with a bald head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding belly, hunched shoulders, and the relaxed position of the arms.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the wide back, muscular shoulders, and the back of the head, with no visible hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the torso and the relaxed hand position.
